title: No Man's Delight
description: Variety your diet with new dishes, what can be made from ingredients of No Man's Lands!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81faacbeb56bbf7897daa90f276b3839ce4f1cdf_0.webp)

# What is No Man's Delight?
-----------------------
No Man's Delight is an extension for the mod No Man's Land that adds many ingredients and dishes that complement the gameplay with the mod Farmers Delight.

## What the mod adds?
-----------------------
- **The mod adds dishes that use ingredients from NML in crafting**
  
- **Also adds pieces of meat from No Man's Land like**:
   Venison Chops, Horse Cuts, Billhook Bass Slices
  
- **Also in vogue are feast dishes like**: Living Soup, Venison Roulade~~~~ and more!


<details>
<summary>Do you plan to update the mod?</summary>

  Yes, I will be adding content when I update the original mod.

</details>
